Combat sport events in 2023
ONE Fight Night 7: Lineker vs. Andrade 2
The poster for ONE Fight Night 7: Lineker vs. Andrade 2
PromotionONE Championship
DateFebruary 25, 2023 (2023-02-25)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 6: Gingsanglek vs. Kongthoranee ONE Fight Night 7: Lineker vs. Andrade 2 ONE Friday Fights 7: Rambolek vs. Teeradech

ONE Fight Night 7: Lineker vs. Andrade 2 was a Combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on February 25, 2023, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.[1][2][3][4]

Background

[edit]

The event was originally scheduled on February 11 at Jakarta Convention Center in Jakarta, Indonesia to host the event.[1] However, the event was moved to Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand and took place on February 25.[5]

A ONE Bantamweight World Championship rematch for the vacant title between former champion John Lineker and #1 ranked contender Fabrício Andrade served as the event headliner.[6] The pairing previously met at ONE on Prime Video 3 in October 2022, Lineker was stripped of the title when he missed weight for his attempted title defense, where the bout ended in a no contest due to an accidental groin strike rendered Lineker unable to continue during the third round.[7][8][9]

A ONE Featherweight Muay Thai World Championship bout between current champion Tawanchai P.K.Saenchai and Jamal Yusupov served as the event's co-headliner.[10]

A featherweight bout between former ONE Featherweight and Lightweight World Champion Martin Nguyen and Shamil Gasanov was scheduled for this event.[11] However, Gasanov was forced to withdraw due to an infection that stemmed from an injury.[12] He was replaced by promotional newcomer Razhab Shaydullaev.[13] In turn, Shaydullaev was forced to withdraw due to undisclosed reasons and was replaced by Leonardo Casotti.[14]

Results

[edit]
Main card (Amazon Prime Video)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight Fabrício Andrade def. John Lineker TKO (corner stoppage) 4 5:00 [a]
Featherweight Muay Thai Tawanchai P.K.Saenchai (c) def. Jamal Yusupov KO (leg kick) 1 0:49 [b]
Featherweight Martin Nguyen def. Leonardo Casotti Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Kickboxing Saemapetch Fairtex def. Zhang Chenglong Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 3:00
Flyweight Danny Kingad def. Eko Roni Saputra Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight (119 lbs) Submission Grappling Danielle Kelly def. Ayaka Miura Decision (unanimous) 1 10:00
Light Heavyweight Kickboxing Françesko Xhaja def. Andrei Stoica Decision (split) 3 3:00
Preliminary card (YouTube / Watch ONE)
Women's Atomweight Victória Souza def. Linda Darrow Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Lightweight Submission Grappling Tommy Langaker def. Uali Kurzhev Submission (heel hook) 1 2:58
Strawweight Adrian Mattheis def. Zelang Zhaxi TKO (punches) 1 0:57
  1. ^ For the vacant ONE Bantamweight World Championship.
  2. ^ For the ONE Featherweight Muay Thai World Championship.

[15]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.[16]

  • Performance of the Night: Tawanchai P.K.Saenchai and Tommy Langaker
